sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me first test if clicking toggles red back to blue
# Click the red cell at top-left of bottom-right panel
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 39, 'col': 40}])

# Check if it toggled back
curr_seg = current_frame.segmentation
br_red = [n for n in curr_seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'R' and n['pixels'] == 36 and 32 <= n['boundary'][0][0] <= 61 and 32 <= n['boundary'][0][1] <= 61]
br_blue = [n for n in curr_seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 36 and 32 <= n['boundary'][0][0] <= 61 and 32 <= n['boundary'][0][1] <= 61]
print(f"Red cells in BR panel: {len(br_red)}")
print(f"Blue cells in BR panel: {len(br_blue)}")
for n in br_red:
    print(f"  Red at ({n['boundary'][0][0]},{n['boundary'][0][1]})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
